texto: Live your life striving to complete the journey to your vision
autor: don't spend your life dreaming of a vision with a journey you are not willing to start.
explicacao: Citação de don't spend your life dreaming of a vision with a journey you are not willing to start. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Live your life striving to complete the journey to your vision” articula reflexao, wayne-chirisa, striving em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.
